title: hieracium pannosum subsp. euboeum
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. euboeum, also known as Euboean hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pannosum subsp. euboeum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
